---
title: "City of Green River, Wyoming Solid Waste Management Plan"
year: 2015
image: /images/green_river_WY.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Green River, Wyoming"
categories: ["Integrated Solid Waste Planning"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

As a sub-consultant to Inberg-Miller Engineers, Mr. Bell assisted the City of
Green River with the waste projections and operational and financial cost
forecasts for their local and regional plans (I-80 Regional Planning Group).
The result of the plan was a recommendation to close the City's unlined
landfill by 2015 and direct haul to the Rock Springs regional landfill. Other
recommendations included considering a regional material recovery facility to
serve the south eastern Wyoming jurisdictions. 

[Thumbnail Image by User: Magicpiano - Own work, CC BY-SA 4.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=62631822)
:::
